<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Apple Pay domain by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/payment-methods/apple-pay/domains/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Get an Apple Pay domain by ID.

    ### Permissions
    * `apple-pay:read`
